name: Zijian Xiong
institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
profile_summary: Researcher working across Compute-in-Memory compiler abstractions, accelerator architecture, and AI inference infrastructure, with recent work on memristor-based LLM acceleration and regular execution strategies for quantized models.
research_focus: Compiler abstractions for CIM stacks: dataflow, placement contracts, precision/residency constraints, and backend legality
CIM accelerator architecture for LLM inference, including memristor-based compute paths and quantized FFN execution
AI inference infrastructure for memory-centric accelerators: scheduling, batching, runtime resource pressure, and serving-oriented evaluation
Hardware-software co-design methods that connect models, mappings, simulators, and backend control for inspectable CIM systems

education.school: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
University of Science and Technology of China
